title: ClearLaggEnhanced
description: The definitive ClearLagg successor for 1.20+. Boost TPS and fix lag on Paper, Spigot, and Folia with smart entity clearing and a real-time Admin GUI.
body:
# 🚀 ClearLaggEnhanced: The Ultimate Minecraft Performance & Lag Fix Plugin

**Stop server lag and boost TPS with the most advanced Minecraft optimization suite for 1.20+ (Paper/Spigot/Purpur/Folia).**

ClearLaggEnhanced is the modern successor to classic performance tools, specifically engineered for high-performance **Minecraft 1.20, 1.21, and beyond**. While original tools paved the way, this version reimagines server optimization with **live monitoring, database persistence, and a full Admin GUI**, making it the definitive choice for modern server owners.

---

### 🛡️ Support the Project via CloudExa Hosting
Support our development by using our affiliate link! Use our special coupon code for **10% OFF** your hosting.
[![Support Us](https://i.ibb.co/TDvjLX3q/test.png)](https://billing.cloudexa-hosting.com/aff.php?aff=41)

---

## ✨ Why Choose ClearLaggEnhanced?

In an era of complex modpacks and high-entity counts, standard item clearing isn't enough. ClearLaggEnhanced provides **surgical precision** for total server health.

* 📊 **Live Health Dashboard:** Monitor **TPS, RAM, and MSPT** spikes in real-time.
* 🖥️ **Admin GUI:** Manage all lag-reduction modules via an intuitive in-game interface—no more config hunting.
* 🛡️ **Smart Entity Protection:** Automatically whitelist named mobs, pets, villagers, and armor stands.
* 🔗 **PAPI Integration:** Use PlaceholderAPI to display server health on scoreboards, HUDs, or TAB menus.
* 💾 **Persistent Logic:** Powered by **SQLite** to ensure your custom configurations and data survive restarts.

---

## 🛠️ Key Optimization Features

### ⚡ Intelligence & Automation
* **Dynamic Mob Limiter:** Cap mobs per chunk to prevent "entity cramming" lag before it starts.
* **Automated Scheduled Clears:** Configurable countdowns with per-world targeting and "Smart Trigger" logic.
* **Spawner Tuning:** Adjust spawn delays and per-chunk limits to balance gameplay and performance.

### 📢 Immersive Player Notifications
Keep your community informed. Use **Titles, Action Bars, Chat messages, and Custom Sounds** to warn users 60s, 30s, or 10s before a clear occurs.

### 🔍 Diagnostic & Fixer Tools
* **`/lagg tps` & `/lagg ram`**: Get instant, high-accuracy readouts of server stability.
* **Chunk Scanning**: Identify "hotspot" chunks that are hoarding entities or tile entities.
* **Threshold Triggers**: Automatically trigger clears **only** when the server hits specific lag milestones.

---

## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: Is this compatible with Folia or Purpur?**
A: Yes! ClearLaggEnhanced is optimized for the latest forks of Spigot and Paper, including Purpur and high-performance environments.

**Q: Will it delete my players' pets?**
A: Never. Our smart-clearing logic ignores tamed animals, named mobs (via name tags), and specialized entities like armor stands by default.

**Q: How do I access the settings?**
A: Simply use the in-game Admin GUI to toggle modules on the fly without needing to reload the plugin.

---
